title: Babylonian Talmud, Yevamot 62b: One Who Lives Without a Wife
description: Yevamot 62b: One Who Lives Without a Wife
introduction: Yevamot 62b: One Who Lives Without a Wife

translation.text: Any man who has no wife lives without joy, without blessing, without good. Without joy: as it is written, 'You shall rejoice, you and your household.'
